intent: Make Trash cards match home file-card styling on mobile and verify batch restore/permanent delete routes at source and runtime.
assumptions: Normal delete remains a soft delete through deleted_at.
Batch trash API routes remain POST /api/files/trash/batch-restore and POST /api/files/trash/batch-permanent.
Runtime 404 was caused by a stale backend process, not missing source routes.
risks: Trash-specific card decorations can drift from homepage card styling.
Mobile console summary and action rows can regress independently because desktop keeps content-sized behavior while mobile intentionally stretches the summary row.
PostgreSQL integration tests share a database and must avoid concurrent cleanup races.
